actions.content: Okay, I've uploaded for you two images and these images are UI references and you must look at them closely and look at how they are designed. You see a banking dashboard clearly designed. That would be the dashboard of our platform. That's how our dashboard is supposed to look like. Instead of using glass, we use soft texture. We'll have a light and dark mode but we use soft texture. The reason why I'm using glass is because we want to avoid rendering problems, making the platform extremely smooth and fast. And for icons, we use an extremely unique set of icons for us. No emojis allowed. So as you can see in the other image, you will see a full-on scale of different pages, right? Notice in our dashboard, you are still revolving to pages. That is exactly what a dashboard is going to look like. But in the other image, we see different concepts. That is for the homepage. That is how the homepage will look like. It will have individual concepts there. Although these are bank-related, they will not be related to our platform, which means you will generate AI images we set as replacements for these images based on what our platform is about. So what is our platform about? Our platform is called Memora. Memora is a study platform for creating quiz, flashcard, AI summary, pinpoint concepts, and other important educational material-like stuff. So pretty much we want to go for this UI but not use glass. We use white soft, darkish blue, and dark. You understand? So your job now, you first create the images that are related to us in the same feel of that bluish feel but about AI and reading and flashcards and quizzes. And then you now design the homepage. A unique design style as you can see in the image, they use an extremely unique design style. The homepage, register, login, dashboard, the create quiz page, the quiz page, and every other page required to make the platform complete.

**Photosynthesis** is the process by which plants convert light energy into chemical energy.

- Occur in the thylakoid membranes

### Calvin Cycle
- Takes place in the stroma
- CO2 is fixed into organic molecules
- Produces G3P

### Important Points
